data.name: ArgumentOutOfRange_Generic_MustBeNonZero
data.value: {0} ('{1}') must be a non-zero value.

data.name: ArgumentOutOfRange_Generic_MustBeNonNegative
data.value: {0} ('{1}') must be a non-negative value.

data.name: ArgumentOutOfRange_Generic_MustBeEqual
data.value: {0} ('{1}') must be equal to '{2}'.

data.name: ArgumentOutOfRange_Generic_MustBeGreater
data.value: {0} ('{1}') must be greater than '{2}'.

data.name: ArgumentOutOfRange_Generic_MustBeGreaterOrEqual
data.value: {0} ('{1}') must be greater than or equal to '{2}'.

data.name: ArgumentOutOfRange_Generic_MustBeLess
data.value: {0} ('{1}') must be less than '{2}'.

data.name: ArgumentOutOfRange_Generic_MustBeLessOrEqual
data.value: {0} ('{1}') must be less than or equal to '{2}'.

data.name: ArgumentOutOfRange_Generic_MustBeNonNegativeNonZero
data.value: {0} ('{1}') must be a non-negative and non-zero value.

data.name: ArgumentOutOfRange_Generic_MustBeNotEqual
data.value: {0} ('{1}') must not be equal to '{2}'.

data.name: Argument_InvalidTypeWithPointersNotSupported
data.value: Cannot use type '{0}'. Only value types without pointers or references are supported.

data.name: Argument_DestinationTooShort
data.value: Destination is too short.

data.name: Argument_InvalidTimeSpanStyles
data.value: An undefined TimeSpanStyles value is being used.

data.name: Argument_InvalidEnumValue
data.value: The value '{0}' is not valid for this usage of the type {1}.

data.name: Argument_OverlapAlignmentMismatch
data.value: Overlapping spans have mismatching alignment.

data.name: ArgumentNull_TypedRefType
data.value: Type in TypedReference cannot be null.

data.name: Arg_AmbiguousMatchException_MemberInfo
data.value: Ambiguous match found for '{0} {1}'.

data.name: Arg_AmbiguousMatchException_Attribute
data.value: Multiple custom attributes of the same type '{0}' found.

data.name: Arg_AmbiguousMatchException_CustomAttributeData
data.value: Ambiguous match found for '{0}'.

data.name: Arg_BogusIComparer
data.value: Unable to sort because the IComparer.Compare() method returns inconsistent results. Either a value does not compare equal to itself, or one value repeatedly compared to another value yields different results. IComparer: '{0}'.

data.name: Arg_CannotBeNaN
data.value: TimeSpan does not accept floating point Not-a-Number values.

data.name: Arg_HandleNotAsync
data.value: Handle does not support asynchronous operations. The parameters to the FileStream constructor may need to be changed to indicate that the handle was opened synchronously (that is, it was not opened for overlapped I/O).

data.name: Arg_HandleNotSync
data.value: Handle does not support synchronous operations. The parameters to the FileStream constructor may need to be changed to indicate that the handle was opened asynchronously (that is, it was opened explicitly for overlapped I/O).

data.name: Arg_InvalidHandle
data.value: Invalid handle.

data.name: Arg_KeyNotFoundWithKey
data.value: The given key '{0}' was not present in the dictionary.

data.name: Arg_NullArgumentNullRef
data.value: The method was called with a null array argument.

data.name: Arg_WrongType
data.value: The value "{0}" is not of type "{1}" and cannot be used in this generic collection.

data.name: Argument_AddingDuplicateWithKey
data.value: An item with the same key has already been added. Key: {0}

data.name: Argument_BadFormatSpecifier
data.value: Format specifier was invalid.

data.name: Argument_CannotExtractScalar
data.value: Cannot extract a Unicode scalar value from the specified index in the input.

data.name: Argument_IncompatibleArrayType
data.value: Target array type is not compatible with the type of items in the collection.

data.name: Argument_InvalidOffLen
data.value: Offset and length were out of bounds for the array or count is greater than the number of elements from index to the end of the source collection.

data.name: Argument_PrecisionTooLarge
data.value: Precision cannot be larger than {0}.

data.name: Argument_UnexpectedStateForKnownCallback
data.value: An unexpected state object was encountered. This is usually a sign of a bug in async method custom infrastructure, such as a custom awaiter or IValueTaskSource implementation.

data.name: ArgumentException_ValueTupleIncorrectType
data.value: Argument must be of type {0}.

data.name: ArgumentOutOfRange_BadHourMinuteSecond
data.value: Hour, Minute, and Second parameters describe an un-representable DateTime.

data.name: ArgumentOutOfRange_BadYearMonthDay
data.value: Year, Month, and Day parameters describe an un-representable DateTime.

data.name: ArgumentOutOfRange_Count
data.value: Count must be positive and count must refer to a location within the string/array/collection.

data.name: ArgumentOutOfRange_DayNumber
data.value: Day number must be between 0 and DateOnly.MaxValue.DayNumber.

data.name: ArgumentOutOfRange_Enum
data.value: Enum value was out of legal range.

data.name: ArgumentOutOfRange_IndexMustBeLess
data.value: Index was out of range. Must be non-negative and less than the size of the collection.

data.name: ArgumentOutOfRange_IndexMustBeLessOrEqual
data.value: Index was out of range. Must be non-negative and less than or equal to the size of the collection.

data.name: ArgumentOutOfRange_Month
data.value: Month must be between one and twelve.

data.name: ArgumentOutOfRange_NeedNonNegNum
data.value: Non-negative number required.

data.name: ArgumentOutOfRange_Range
data.value: Valid values are between {0} and {1}, inclusive.

data.name: ArgumentOutOfRange_RoundingDigits
data.value: Rounding digits must be between 0 and 15, inclusive.

data.name: ArgumentOutOfRange_RoundingDigits_MathF
data.value: Rounding digits must be between 0 and 6, inclusive.

data.name: ArgumentOutOfRange_Year
data.value: Year must be between 1 and 9999.

data.name: Format_BadBoolean
data.value: String '{0}' was not recognized as a valid Boolean.

data.name: Format_IndexOutOfRange
data.value: Index (zero based) must be greater than or equal to zero and less than the size of the argument list.

data.name: Format_InvalidString
data.value: Input string was not in a correct format.

data.name: Format_InvalidStringWithOffsetAndReason
data.value: Input string was not in a correct format. Failure to parse near offset {0}. {1}

data.name: Format_NeedSingleChar
data.value: String must be exactly one character long.

data.name: InvalidOperation_ConcurrentOperationsNotSupported
data.value: Operations that change non-concurrent collections must have exclusive access. A concurrent update was performed on this collection and corrupted its state. The collection's state is no longer correct.

data.name: InvalidOperation_EnumEnded
data.value: Enumeration already finished.

data.name: InvalidOperation_EnumFailedVersion
data.value: Collection was modified; enumeration operation may not execute.

data.name: InvalidOperation_EnumNotStarted
data.value: Enumeration has not started. Call MoveNext.

data.name: InvalidOperation_EnumOpCantHappen
data.value: Enumeration has either not started or has already finished.

data.name: InvalidOperation_HandleIsNotInitialized
data.value: Handle is not initialized.

data.name: InvalidOperation_HandleIsNotPinned
data.value: Handle is not pinned.

data.name: InvalidOperation_InvalidUtf8
data.value: Formatted string contains characters not representable as valid UTF-8.

data.name: InvalidOperation_NoValue
data.value: Nullable object must have a value.

data.name: IO_EOF_ReadBeyondEOF
data.value: Unable to read beyond the end of the stream.

data.name: Lock_Enter_WaiterCountOverflow_OutOfMemoryException
data.value: The lock has reached the limit of how many threads may wait for the lock.

data.name: Lock_Exit_SynchronizationLockException
data.value: The calling thread does not hold the lock.

data.name: NotSupported_UnreadableStream
data.value: Stream does not support reading.

data.name: NotSupported_UnseekableStream
data.value: Stream does not support seeking.

data.name: NotSupported_UnwritableStream
data.value: Stream does not support writing.

data.name: ObjectDisposed_FileClosed
data.value: Cannot access a closed file.

data.name: ObjectDisposed_StreamClosed
data.value: Cannot access a closed Stream.

data.name: OutOfMemory_StringTooLong
data.value: String length exceeded supported range.

data.name: Overflow_Duration
data.value: The duration cannot be returned for TimeSpan.MinValue because the absolute value of TimeSpan.MinValue exceeds the value of TimeSpan.MaxValue.

data.name: Overflow_NegateTwosCompNum
data.value: Negating the minimum value of a twos complement number is invalid.

data.name: Overflow_TimeSpanTooLong
data.value: TimeSpan overflowed because the duration is too long.

data.name: Format_BadQuote
data.value: Cannot find a matching quote character for the character '{0}'.

data.name: Lock_Enter_LockRecursionException
data.value: The lock has reached the limit of recursive enters.

data.name: InvalidOperation_InvalidHandle
data.value: The handle is invalid.

data.name: Threading_WaitHandleTooManyPosts
data.value: The WaitHandle cannot be signaled because it would exceed its maximum count.

data.name: Arg_SynchronizationLockException
data.value: Object synchronization method was called from an unsynchronized block of code.

data.name: Overflow_MutexReacquireCount
data.value: The current thread attempted to reacquire a mutex that has reached its maximum acquire count.
